creator: russ.haley@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to andrew from comment #5)

I'm sorry, I thought bumping the default value was the purpose of an exp-run. It hadn't occurred to me I wasn't specific about that.

Yes, I was hoping to have the default Lua version bumped to 5.4 to record the fallout. The same as was done with bug 220281 (for Lua 5.3).

In terms of managing Lua packages, I had briefly discussed with jbeich the possibility of using LuaRocks. With the imminent release of LuaRocks 3.0, I was hoping to potentially leverage that.
